title: TrustForge Conformance Claim
description: Manifest describing which TrustForge profiles a deployment claims to implement (TF-0010). Distinct from the repo's conformance/ test-harness directory.

conformance_version.description: Version of the conformance manifest schema itself.

claimed_profiles.description: Profile identifiers this deployment claims to conform to.

extensions.description: Optional profile-specific extensions this deployment supports.
